name: The Back Nine Golf | Tempe, AZ
about: The Back Nine Golf in Tempe, AZ offers a golf simulation experience with a focus on technology and playability. The venue features multiple bays equipped with advanced simulator technology for year-round golf practice and play. It caters to golfers looking for a convenient, climate-controlled environment to work on their game or enjoy a round of virtual golf. The facility is designed to provide a modern and accessible golf experience for players of various skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology for realistic ball and club tracking
Variety of simulator software options for diverse golf experiences
Professional coaching available for skill improvement
Flexible booking options for individuals and groups

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides club rentals if you don't have your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified, please contact the venue directly for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator take 1.5-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf welcomes families and children, making it suitable for junior golfers.
